articles.title: Bessent sees 'substantial disinflation' ahead as Warsh takes over the Fed
articles.body: Bessent said the energy-fed inflation surge recently is likely to reverse as the U.S. is "going to keep pumping."

articles.title: 65% of workers have avoided using AI for moral, environmental, privacy or other reasons: CNBC survey
articles.body: Workers and students in the U.S. say they're skeptical of AI due to moral, privacy or accuracy concerns, the CNBC and SurveyMonkey Quarterly AI and Jobs Survey finds.
